title: Plain standalone class
instruction: In the sandbox model, create a plain standalone class named DemoNoteFormatter with: a str member variable 'prefix'; a constructor (new(str _prefix)) that sets it; an instance method format(str _text) that returns prefix + ': ' + _text; and a static factory method construct(str _prefix) that returns a new instance. Not a CoC extension, business event, batch artifact, or SSRS component -- just a basic utility class demonstrating constructor/member-variable/instance-method/static-method mechanics. The class must build clean.
